zh.Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British C: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿可馬可米德萊可
zh.Whiteparish, Wiltshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭維爾爾特帕利申
zh.Middlesex, Virginia, United States: 美國維吉尼亞州米德萊可
zh.Middlesex, Virginia, Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Barbee於1587年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾特帕利申時，他的父親Edward Saint Barbe Esquire26歲，母親Christian Beswick25歲。他於0025年12月與Anne Miller在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1630年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿可馬可米德萊可享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Barbee于1587年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾特帕利申时，他的父亲Edward Saint Barbe Esquire26岁，母亲Christian Beswick25岁。他于0025年12月与Anne Miller在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1630年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿可馬可米德萊可享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barbee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of French Huguenot origin): Anglicized form of French Barbé (see Barbe ).
Americanized form of French Barbier and possibly also of Barbé (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Barby
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Otto, Wolfgang.  French Celestine, Pierre.
German: habitational name from a place so named in Saxony-Anhalt.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

en.lifeSummary: When John Barbee was born in 1587, in Whiteparish, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Saint Barbe Esquire, was 26 and his mother, Christian Beswick, was 25. He married Anne Miller in December 0025, in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1630, in Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Barbee est né en 1587, à Whiteparish, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Saint Barbe Esquire, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Christian Beswick, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anne Miller en décembre 0025, à Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1630, à Middlesex, Accomack, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Barbee 1587 in Whiteparish, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Saint Barbe Esquire 26 und seine Mutter Christian Beswick 25. Er hat im Dezember 0025 in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America Anne Miller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1630 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America.

Lui sposato Anne Miller nel dicembre 0025, nel Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1630, nel Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Barbeeが1587年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアウィテパーイッシュで生まれた時，父Edward Saint Barbe Esquireは26歳，母Christian Beswickは25歳であった。0025年12月にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスでAnne Millerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州アッコイマックミッドレセックスで43歳で死去した。

ko.Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 악코맥 미들레세스
ko.Middlesex, Virginia, Colonial America: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스
ko.lifeSummary: John Barbee(이)가 1587년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 휘테파리시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Saint Barbe Esquire(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Beswick(은)는 25세였다. 그는 0025년 12월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스에서 Anne Miller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1630년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 악코맥 미들레세스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Anne Miller em dezembro de 0025, em Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British C: миддлесекс, аккомакк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Barbee родился в 1587 г. в местности уитепэриш, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward Saint Barbe Esquire было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Beswick, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Miller декабрь 0025 г. в местности миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1630 г. в местности миддлесекс, аккомакк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 43 лет.
